name: Striped Hand Towel Blue - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of nautical charm to your bathroom decor with this Coastal Hand Towel from Threshold™. Finished with contrast edging, this hand towel is accented with an embroidered sea-themed motif for a fun look. The 100% terry cotton material makes it soft and highly absorbent. Hang it in your bathroom and machine wash as needed for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
